chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6027 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.6307/2024 2. For hearing of CMA No.28130/2023 3. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Mr. Salman Ahmed Sheikh, advocate for the petitioner Syed Kamran Ali advocate holds brief for Syed Asif Ali, advocate for respondent No.4 Qazi Abdul Haleem Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel has challenged an order dated 07.12.2023, rendered by the Registrar of Trade Mark, available at page 21 of the court file. The only premise agitated is no further provision of appeal is available under the relevant law to assail the impugned order. Absence of appeal is no grounds for preferring this petition in writ jurisdiction. This plea is also misconceived in view of the judgment of the Supreme Court passed in Gul Taiz Khan Marwat vs. The Registrar, Peshawar High Court, Peshawar (PLD 2021 SC 391). In view hereof no case is made out, hence, this petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
